column1: # /File Retrieve — load an xlsx from disk, replacing in-memory state.
# Flow: save A1=42, dirty A1 in-memory to 99, then /FR the saved file
# and verify A1 reads 42 again — proving the retrieve actually pulled
# the saved copy, not what was in-memory.
# Dirty the in-memory A1 to 99 without saving.
# Commit → load replaces memory → A1 is the saved 42 again.
